text: Science has a clearer story about state dependent memory than social media does. State dependent memory suggests our recall is tied to our emotional or physical state. Ever wondered why you remember things better when you’re in the same mood? Research shows that if you learn something while happy, you're more likely to recall it when you’re happy. So, your mood isn’t just a feeling; it's a key to unlocking memories. Curious to learn more about your mind? Follow for deeper insights!
